info.title: Anaplan CloudWorks API
info.description:
The Anaplan CloudWorks API enables you to create your own connections and integrations with Anaplan CloudWorks, supporting data movement between cloud storage services (Amazon S3, Google BigQuery, Azure Blob Storage) and Anaplan models.

**Base URL**: Both `https://api.cloudworks.anaplan.com/2/0/` and `https://api.anaplan.com/cloudworks/2/0/` are active. The `api.cloudworks.anaplan.com` form is listed first. Both `AnaplanAuthToken` and `Bearer` (with an AnaplanAuthToken value) are accepted.

**Date and time formats used across this API:**
- `startDate` / `endDate` on run records: ISO 8601 UTC with milliseconds — `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.sssZ`
- `lastRun` on run records: Unix timestamp integer (seconds since epoch)
- `createdDate` / `modifiedDate` on integration flow steps: space-separated timestamp with timezone — `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.uuuuuu+00:00`
- `schedule.nextScheduleDate` and similar date-only fields: ISO 8601 date — `YYYY-MM-DD`

**ID formats used across this API:**
- Most entity IDs (`integrationId`, `connectionId`, `workspaceId`, `notificationId`, flow `id`, run `id`, `traceId`, `userGuid`): 32-character lowercase hex
- `modelId`: 32-character **uppercase** hex (the only uppercase ID in the API)
- `processId`, `actionId`, `fileId`: numeric string

get.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Retrieve all connections available to the authenticated user.

post.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Create a new connection to Amazon S3, Google BigQuery, or Azure Blob Storage for use in CloudWorks integrations.

workspaceId.description: Anaplan workspace ID. Required for restricted integration users — the workspace that contains this connection's model. Read it from that model's record: `GET /models/{modelId}` (`currentWorkspaceId`) in the Integration API, or `GET /models` matched by `name`, then take `currentWorkspaceId`. Must match the model's workspace.

Anaplan workspace ID. Required for restricted integration users — the workspace that contains this connection's model. Read it from that model's record: `GET /models/{modelId}` (`currentWorkspaceId`) in the Integration API, or `GET /models` matched by `name`, then take `currentWorkspaceId`. Must match the model's workspace.

auth_method.description: Authentication method. `"SAS-based"` uses a Shared Access Signature token and is the backwards-compatible default. This field became required in a recent CloudWorks update that introduced OAuth 2.0 support.

sasToken.description: Azure Shared Access Signature token. Required when `auth_method` is `"SAS-based"`.

workspaceId.description: Anaplan workspace ID. Required for restricted integration users — the workspace that contains this connection's model. Read it from that model's record: `GET /models/{modelId}` (`currentWorkspaceId`) in the Integration API, or `GET /models` matched by `name`, then take `currentWorkspaceId`. Must match the model's workspace.

auth_method.description: Authentication method for OAuth 2.0. The Anaplan UI selects `"Oauth2"` for this variant, but the exact API-level value has not been confirmed via live testing. Must not be `"SAS-based"`.

clientId.description: Azure app registration Client ID (from Microsoft Entra ID application Overview). Property name inferred from Anaplan UI docs — exact API key name unconfirmed.

clientSecret.description: Azure app registration client secret (from Certificates & secrets). Property name inferred from Anaplan UI docs — exact API key name unconfirmed.

tenantId.description: Azure Tenant ID (from Microsoft Entra ID application Overview). Property name inferred from Anaplan UI docs — exact API key name unconfirmed.

workspaceId.description: Anaplan workspace ID. Required for restricted integration users — the workspace that contains this connection's model. Read it from that model's record: `GET /models/{modelId}` (`currentWorkspaceId`) in the Integration API, or `GET /models` matched by `name`, then take `currentWorkspaceId`. Must match the model's workspace.

schema.description: Updated connection details. Shape mirrors the create request body for the relevant connection type.

patch.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Partially update one or more fields of an existing connection.

schema.description: Fields to update. Only supplied fields are modified.

get.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Retrieve all integrations. Returns 25 integrations if `offset` and `limit` are not provided.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip. First element is 0.

parameters.name: myIntegrations
parameters.description: Set to `1` to return only the current user's integrations.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with `-` for descending order. Example: `name` (ascending) or `-name` (descending).

post.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Create a new import/export integration or process integration. For process integrations, include `processId` in the request body. The `jobs` array is required for import/export integrations and optional (0 or more) for process integrations.

workspaceId.description: Anaplan workspace ID — the workspace that contains this call's model. Read it from that model's record: `GET /models/{modelId}` (`currentWorkspaceId`) in the Integration API, or `GET /models` matched by `name`, then take `currentWorkspaceId`. Must match the model's workspace.

modelId.description: Anaplan model ID. From `GET /models` in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2) (`models[].id`).

processId.description: Anaplan process ID. Required for process integrations. From `GET /models/{modelId}/processes` in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2) (`processes[].id`).

nuxVisible.description: Whether the integration is visible in the CloudWorks UI.

jobs.description: Import/export job definitions. Required for import/export integrations; optional for process integrations.

put.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Full update of an integration or process integration. The request body replaces all editable fields.

workspaceId.description: Anaplan workspace ID — the workspace that contains this call's model. Read it from that model's record: `GET /models/{modelId}` (`currentWorkspaceId`) in the Integration API, or `GET /models` matched by `name`, then take `currentWorkspaceId`. Must match the model's workspace.

modelId.description: Anaplan model ID. From `GET /models` in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2) (`models[].id`).

processId.description: Anaplan process ID. Required for process integrations. From `GET /models/{modelId}/processes` in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2) (`processes[].id`).

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: Anaplan model ID. From `GET /models` in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2).

get.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

**Deprecated:** This endpoint is no longer served — it returns an HTTP 404 from the gateway for any modelId, under every role. Retained in the spec for historical completeness; do not call it. See cloudworks/README.md for details.

post.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Create a schedule for an integration. Supports a maximum of one schedule per integration. Schedule types: `weekly`, `daily`, `hourly`, `monthly_specific_day`, `monthly_relative_weekday`.

integrationId.description: Integration ID (may be included in body as well as path). From `GET /integrations` (`integrations[].integrationId`).

post.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Enable or disable the schedule for an integration.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip. First element is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of run records to return.

parameters.name: notificationId
parameters.description: Notification configuration identifier. From `GET /integrations/notification`, or the `notificationId` field on each item of `GET /integrations`.

get.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Retrieve the import error log (dump file) for a specific run. The response body contains a CSV-formatted error log.

parameters.name: actionId
parameters.description: Anaplan action ID of the import step whose error log to fetch. Because this endpoint returns an import error log, the action is always an import: from `GET /models/{modelId}/imports` (`imports[].id`) in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2).

get.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Retrieve the process import error log (dump file) for a specific run and action.

post.description:
Minimum role: Restricted Integration User.

Create a new multi-step integration flow. Requires at least two enabled steps.

referrer.description: The integration ID that this step references.

dependsOn.description: IDs of steps this step depends on.

exceptionBehavior.description: Defines flow behavior when this step fails or partially succeeds.

strategy.description: Default for `failure` is `stop`; default for `partial_success` is `continue`.

get.summary: Get an integration flow by ID

200.description: Integration flow details including all step definitions.

schema.description: Updated integration flow. Shape mirrors the create request body.

stepsToRun.description: Optional subset of step IDs to run. If omitted, all steps run.

Job.description: An import or export job within an integration.

connectionId.description: 32-character lowercase hex connection ID. Present when source is a cloud storage type. From `GET /integrations/connections` (`connections[].connectionId`).

file.description: File path within the cloud storage container.

table.description: BigQuery table name. Present when source is GoogleBigQuery.

actionId.description: Numeric string Anaplan action ID, in the generic sense — an import, an export, or a (delete/sort/etc.) action. Present when source is Anaplan. Depending on the action type, from `GET /models/{modelId}/imports` (`imports[].id`), `GET /models/{modelId}/exports` (`exports[].id`), or `GET /models/{modelId}/actions` (`actions[].id`) in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2).

connectionName.description: Display name of the connection (read-only, present in GET responses).

isConnectionDeleted.description: True if the referenced connection has been deleted (read-only, present in GET responses).

bucketName.description: Container or bucket name for the cloud storage connection (read-only, present in GET responses). Named `bucketName` regardless of connection type — represents the Azure Blob container name for AzureBlob connections.

actionId.description: Numeric string Anaplan action ID, in the generic sense — an import, an export, or a (delete/sort/etc.) action. Present when target is Anaplan. Depending on the action type, from `GET /models/{modelId}/imports` (`imports[].id`), `GET /models/{modelId}/exports` (`exports[].id`), or `GET /models/{modelId}/actions` (`actions[].id`) in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2).

fileId.description: Anaplan file ID. Present when target is Anaplan. For an import (`*ToAnaplan`), this is the file the import action reads — from that import's metadata via `GET /models/{modelId}/imports/{importId}` (`importDataSourceId`) in the [Integration API](https://help.anaplan.com/integration-api-v20-3107aa54-d12b-4c48-9550-3561c84adbb2), not the model-wide `GET /models/{modelId}/files` list. For an export (`AnaplanTo*`), the file is identified by the export action itself — `fileId` equals the `exportId`, with no separate file lookup.

connectionId.description: 32-character lowercase hex connection ID. Present when target is a cloud storage type. From `GET /integrations/connections` (`connections[].connectionId`).

connectionName.description: Display name of the connection (read-only, present in GET responses).

isConnectionDeleted.description: True if the referenced connection has been deleted (read-only, present in GET responses).

bucketName.description: Container or bucket name for the cloud storage connection (read-only, present in GET responses). Named `bucketName` regardless of connection type.

Schedule.description: Schedule definition. Required fields vary by `type`.

time.description: Run time in HH:MM format. Required for `weekly`, `daily`, `monthly_specific_day`, `monthly_relative_weekday`.

fromTime.description: Start of hourly window in HH:MM format. Required for `hourly`.

toTime.description: End of hourly window in HH:MM format. Required for `hourly`.

daysOfWeek.description: Days of the week (0=Sunday). Required for `weekly`, `hourly`, `monthly_relative_weekday`.

dayOfMonth.description: Day of the month (1–31). Required for `monthly_specific_day`.

dayOfWeek.description: Day of the week (0=Sunday). Required for `monthly_relative_weekday`.

repeatEvery.description: Repeat interval. Required for `monthly_relative_weekday` (nth weekday of month) and `hourly` (every N hours).

status.description: Schedule enabled/disabled state. Present in GET responses; not required in create/update requests.

integrationIds.description: Integration IDs to attach this notification to. Currently supports a single ID. From `GET /integrations` (`integrations[].integrationId`).

notifications.description: Notification rules; each entry in config maps an outcome type to the users to notify.

type.description: The integration outcome that triggers notification: success, partial_failure, or full_failure.

RunId.name: runId
RunId.description: Integration run identifier — the `id` of each entry under `history_of_runs.runs` in `GET /integrations/runs/{integrationId}`.

IntegrationId.name: integrationId
IntegrationId.description: Integration identifier — the `integrationId` field of each item in `GET /integrations` (not `id`).
